query:
SELECT e.id, e.nomeCompleto, e.status as empStatus, vp.status as feriaStatus, vp.dataInicio, vp.dataFim 
FROM employees e 
INNER JOIN vacation_periods vp ON vp.employeeId = e.id 
WHERE vp.status = 'em_gozo' AND vp.deletedAt IS NULL AND e.deletedAt IS NULL;
